input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.1.1
            TITLE: forward of the front bulkhead there must be an impact attenuator with an anti intrusion

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.1.1: Forward of the Front Bulkhead there must be an Impact Attenuator with an Anti Intrusion
F.8.1.1 Forward of the Front Bulkhead there must be an Impact Attenuator with an Anti Intrusion 
Plate between the Impact Attenuator and the Front Bulkhead.

final_answer: Forward of the Front Bulkhead there must be an Impact Attenuator with an Anti Intrusion Plate between the Impact Attenuator and the Front Bulkhead.
